title: The Straw Hats Raise Their First Pirate Flag
description: On pages 1–4, the Straw Hats settle into life aboard their new ship, raise their pirate flag, and meet Johnny and Yosaku on the way toward a cook.
scene: The crew’s mood is lighter after Syrup Village, but practical problems quickly appear: they need roles, supplies, medical help, and eventually a cook.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hahaha! I put a lot of thought in to making our symbol!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Calling him artistically challenged would be an understatement...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No... this could be some sort of abstract art...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A pirate's flag should be a symbol of death, but this flag is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well... I guess it's quite terrifying in a sense.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It doesn't look even remotely like the other one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's great! Draw one on our sail too later!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yeah well, I've honed my artistic talents by drawing on the walls of people's homes for years.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm quite the master artist, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: With this, our pirate ship "going merry" is ready for action!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, what're you doing all of a sudden!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm testing out our cannon! It'd be a waste not to make good use of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I can't get it to fire well....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Judging the distance between here and the target...

summary: This part acts as a bridge from Syrup Village to Baratie, giving Usopp a place on the crew and steering the story toward Sanji’s introduction.
